EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted pod templates on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete pod templates on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about pod templates on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a pod template on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about pod templates on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a pod template on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about pod templates on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting pod templates on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
